mapper.sql: SELECT mi.media_id, mi.batch_id, mb.user_id, mb.album_id, COALESCE(mb.title, mi.title) AS title, mi.media_type, mb.uploaded_at, mb.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, medium_mv.storage_key AS medium_storage_key, small_mv.storage_key AS small_storage_key, thumb_mv.storage_key AS thumb_storage_key, preview_mv.storage_key AS preview_storage_key, original_mv.storage_key AS original_storage_key, original_mv.file_org_name AS original_file_name, original_mv.mime_type AS original_mime_type, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_LIKE bl WHERE bl.batch_id = mb.batch_id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c WHERE c.batch_id = mb.batch_id AND c.del_yn='N') AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_LIKE me WHERE me.batch_id = mb.batch_id AND me.user_id = #{userId}) AS liked_by_me, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(t.tag_scope,'N'),'|',t.tag_name) SEPARATOR ',') FROM BATCH_TAG bt JOIN TAG t ON bt.tag_id=t.tag_id WHERE bt.batch_id=mb.batch_id AND t.del_yn='N') AS tags_csv FROM MEDIA_BATCH mb JOIN MEDIA_ITEMS mi ON mi.media_id = mb.cover_media_id AND mi.del_yn='N' JOIN USER u ON mb.user_id = u.user_id JOIN ALBUM a ON mb.album_id = a.album_id LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT medium_mv ON mi.media_id = medium_mv.media_id AND medium_mv.variant_type = 'MEDIUM' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT small_mv ON mi.media_id = small_mv.media_id AND small_mv.variant_type = 'SMALL' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT thumb_mv ON mi.media_id = thumb_mv.media_id AND thumb_mv.variant_type = 'THUMB' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT preview_mv ON mi.media_id = preview_mv.media_id AND preview_mv.variant_type = 'PREVIEW' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT original_mv ON mi.media_id = original_mv.media_id AND original_mv.variant_type = 'ORIGINAL' WHERE mb.del_yn='N' AND u.del_yn='N' AND a.del_yn='N'
mapper.select: SELECT mi.media_id, mi.batch_id, mi.user_id, mi.album_id, mi.title, mi.media_type, mi.uploaded_at, mi.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, medium_mv.storage_key AS medium_storage_key, small_mv.storage_key AS small_storage_key, thumb_mv.storage_key AS thumb_storage_key, preview_mv.storage_key AS preview_storage_key, original_mv.storage_key AS original_storage_key, original_mv.file_org_name AS original_file_name, original_mv.mime_type AS original_mime_type, 0 AS like_count, 0 AS comment_count, 0 AS liked_by_me, '' AS tags_csv FROM MEDIA_ITEMS mi JOIN USER u ON mi.user_id=u.user_id JOIN ALBUM a ON mi.album_id=a.album_id LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT medium_mv ON mi.media_id = medium_mv.media_id AND medium_mv.variant_type='MEDIUM' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT small_mv ON mi.media_id = small_mv.media_id AND small_mv.variant_type='SMALL' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT thumb_mv ON mi.media_id = thumb_mv.media_id AND thumb_mv.variant_type='THUMB' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT preview_mv ON mi.media_id = preview_mv.media_id AND preview_mv.variant_type='PREVIEW' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT original_mv ON mi.media_id = original_mv.media_id AND original_mv.variant_type='ORIGINAL' WHERE mi.media_id=#{mediaId} AND mi.del_yn='N' AND u.del_yn='N' AND a.del_yn='N'

SELECT mi.media_id, mi.batch_id, mi.user_id, mi.album_id, mi.title, mi.media_type, mi.uploaded_at, mi.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, medium_mv.storage_key AS medium_storage_key, small_mv.storage_key AS small_storage_key, thumb_mv.storage_key AS thumb_storage_key, preview_mv.storage_key AS preview_storage_key, original_mv.storage_key AS original_storage_key, original_mv.file_org_name AS original_file_name, original_mv.mime_type AS original_mime_type, 0 AS like_count, 0 AS comment_count, 0 AS liked_by_me, '' AS tags_csv FROM MEDIA_ITEMS mi JOIN USER u ON mi.user_id=u.user_id JOIN ALBUM a ON mi.album_id=a.album_id LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT medium_mv ON mi.media_id = medium_mv.media_id AND medium_mv.variant_type='MEDIUM' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT small_mv ON mi.media_id = small_mv.media_id AND small_mv.variant_type='SMALL' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT thumb_mv ON mi.media_id = thumb_mv.media_id AND thumb_mv.variant_type='THUMB' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT preview_mv ON mi.media_id = preview_mv.media_id AND preview_mv.variant_type='PREVIEW' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT original_mv ON mi.media_id = original_mv.media_id AND original_mv.variant_type='ORIGINAL' WHERE mi.media_id IN #{mediaId} AND mi.del_yn='N' AND u.del_yn='N' AND a.del_yn='N'

SELECT c.comment_id, c.batch_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.display_name FROM COMMENT c JOIN USER u ON c.user_id=u.user_id WHERE c.batch_id=#{batchId} AND c.del_yn='N' AND u.del_yn='N' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.comment_id ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.batch_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.display_name FROM COMMENT c JOIN USER u ON c.user_id=u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id=#{commentId} AND c.del_yn='N' AND u.del_yn='N' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENT (comment_id, batch_id, parent_id, user_id, content, created_at, del_yn) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{batchId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), 'N')
INSERT INTO BATCH_LIKE (batch_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{batchId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BATCH_LIKE WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEDIA_BATCH SET title=#{title}, album_id=#{albumId} WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND del_yn='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO BATCH_TAG (batch_id, tag_id, created_at) VALUES (#{batchId}, #{tagId}, NOW())
